prompt:
A small aquarium maintenance notebook open to a dated pH log entry page, with a single used pH test strip resting on a clean plastic tray beside it. The page shows a simple table layout and a circled value, but all writing is intentionally unreadable and non-specific.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a clean near-future home aquaria aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, tidy tools, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Compose so the notebook page and test strip are unmistakably the focal elements.
